title: Custom Machinery Create
body:
Custom Machinery Create is an addon of the [Custom Machinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-machinery) mod that add integration for [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create).

This addon can be used to create a custom machine that can interact with create contraption system (Kinetic speed and stress).

Obviously, this addon requires Custom Machinery and Create to be installed.


### Currently supported Create features : 

- Kinetic speed/stress
- Schematiccanon
 

This addon also brings full compatibility with KubeJS and Crafttweaker for creating machine recipes.
